name: Yamamoto Genryusai Shigekuni

zanpakuto.name: Ryujin Jakka
zanpakuto.releaseCommand: Turn all creation to ash, Ryujin Jakka!

description: Yamamoto Genryusai Shigekuni was the founder and former Head Captain of the Gotei 13. The oldest and most powerful Shinigami, he commanded overwhelming fire-based abilities with his Zanpakuto Ryujin Jakka. He was a strict enforcer of law and order who founded the Gotei 13 over 2,000 years ago.

name: Soi Fon

zanpakuto.name: Suzumebachi
zanpakuto.releaseCommand: Sting all the enemies to death, Suzumebachi!

description: Soi Fon is the captain of the 2nd Division and commander of the Onmitsukidō (Stealth Force). A petite but deadly assassin, she is fiercely loyal and specializes in high-speed combat and her Zanpakuto Suzumebachi, which delivers a deadly two-hit kill.

name: Yoruichi Shihouin
description: Yoruichi Shihouin is the former captain of the 2nd Division and former head of the Shihouin Clan. Known as the Flash Goddess for her unmatched speed and mastery of Shunpo and Shunko, she is playful, intelligent, and a close friend of Kisuke Urahara.

name: Rojuro Otoribashi
description: Rojuro Otoribashi, also known as Rose, is the captain of the 3rd Division and a Visored. He has a flamboyant personality, loves music and guitar, and wields the music-based Zanpakuto Kinshara.

name: Gin Ichimaru
description: Gin Ichimaru was the former captain of the 3rd Division. Known for his perpetual fox-like grin and sarcastic demeanor, he betrayed Soul Society alongside Aizen. His true goal was to avenge Rangiku by killing Aizen. His Zanpakuto Shinso extends at high speed.

name: Retsu Unohana
description: Retsu Unohana was the captain of the 4th Division and former captain of the 11th Division. Publicly known as a kind healer, she was secretly the first Kenpachi — a bloodthirsty master of swordsmanship and the most dangerous fighter in Soul Society history.

name: Shinji Hirako
description: Shinji Hirako is the captain of the 5th Division and leader of the Visored. He has a laid-back, sarcastic personality and wields the inverted-sense Zanpakuto Sakanade.

name: Sosuke Aizen
description: Sosuke Aizen is a former captain of the 5th Division and the main antagonist. A master manipulator with genius intellect, his Zanpakuto Kyoka Suigetsu creates perfect illusions through complete hypnosis.

name: Byakuya Kuchiki
description: Byakuya Kuchiki is the captain of the 6th Division and 28th head of the Kuchiki Clan. Noble, stoic, and rule-abiding, he wields the cherry blossom Zanpakuto Senbonzakura.

name: Sajin Komamura
description: Sajin Komamura is the former captain of the 7th Division. A wolf-like humanoid who joined the Gotei to repay Yamamoto's kindness, he wields the giant Bankai Kokujo Tengen Myo'o.

name: Tetsuzaemon Iba
description: Tetsuzaemon Iba is the captain of the 7th Division. A tough, manly lieutenant who succeeded Komamura, he values honor and the code of the 7th Division.

name: Shunsui Kyoraku

zanpakuto.name: Katen Kyokotsu
zanpakuto.releaseCommand: Flower Wind, Flowing Sky, Turn the Heavens to Crimson, Demon's Dance, Katen Kyokotsu!

description: Shunsui Kyoraku is the current Head Captain and former captain of the 8th Division. Laid-back, romantic, and strategic, he is one of the most powerful captains with his dual Zanpakuto Katen Kyokotsu.

name: Kensei Muguruma
description: Kensei Muguruma is the captain of the 9th Division and a Visored. He has a strict, no-nonsense personality and wields the wind/blade Zanpakuto Tachikaze.

name: Kaname Tosen
description: Kaname Tosen was the former captain of the 9th Division. Blind and idealistic, he joined Aizen to create a 'just' world. His Zanpakuto Suzumushi creates silence and illusions.

name: Toshiro Hitsugaya

zanpakuto.name: Hyōrinmaru
zanpakuto.releaseCommand: Sit upon the frozen heavens, Hyōrinmaru!

description: Toshiro Hitsugaya is the captain of the 10th Division, known as the 'Genius Boy'. He is the youngest captain in history and controls ice with his Zanpakuto Hyorinmaru.

name: Kurosaki Isshin
description: Isshin Kurosaki is Ichigo's father and former captain of the 10th Division. He hid his Shinigami powers while living in the human world and wields the fire-type Zanpakuto Engetsu.

name: Kenpachi Zaraki
description: Kenpachi Zaraki is the captain of the 11th Division and the strongest swordsman in the Gotei 13. He lives for battle and wields the brute-force Zanpakuto Nozarashi.

name: Mayuri Kurotsuchi
description: Mayuri Kurotsuchi is the captain of the 12th Division and president of the Shinigami Research Institute. A mad scientist with no morals, he modifies his own body and creates deadly inventions.

name: Kisuke Urahara
description: Kisuke Urahara is the former captain of the 12th Division and owner of the Urahara Shop. A brilliant inventor and strategist, he is laid-back but extremely knowledgeable.

name: Jushiro Ukitake

zanpakuto.name: Sōgyo no Kotowari
zanpakuto.releaseCommand: All waves, rise now and become my shield! Lightning strike and become my blade! Sōgyo no Kotowari!

description: Jushiro Ukitake was the captain of the 13th Division. Kind and respected, he suffered from a chronic illness but was one of the most powerful and honorable captains.

name: Rukia Kuchiki
description: Rukia Kuchiki is the captain of the 13th Division and adoptive sister of Byakuya. She gave her powers to Ichigo and is known for her determination and ice Zanpakuto Sode no Shirayuki.

name: Chōjirō Sasakibe
description: Chōjirō Sasakibe was the lieutenant of the 1st Division. Loyal to Yamamoto for over 2,000 years, he wielded the lightning Bankai Koko Gonryo Rikyu.

name: Genshirō Okikiba
description: Genshirō Okikiba is the current lieutenant of the 1st Division. A serious and dutiful officer who supports the Head Captain.

name: Marechiyo Ōmaeda
description: Marechiyo Ōmaeda is the lieutenant of the 2nd Division. Greedy and cowardly in appearance, he is actually a skilled and loyal subordinate to Soi Fon.

name: Izuru Kira
description: Izuru Kira is the lieutenant of the 3rd Division. A talented but pessimistic Shinigami whose Zanpakuto Wabisuke doubles the weight of anything it strikes.

name: Isane Kotetsu
description: Isane Kotetsu is the captain of the 4th Division. Tall and kind-hearted, she is a skilled healer and former lieutenant under Unohana.

name: Momo Hinamori
description: Momo Hinamori is the lieutenant of the 5th Division. Loyal and emotional, she idolized Aizen and wields the fire Zanpakuto Tobiume.

name: Renji Abarai
description: Renji Abarai is the lieutenant of the 6th Division. Hot-blooded and loyal, he is Ichigo's rival and wields the Bankai Hihio Zabimaru.

name: Nanao Ise
description: Nanao Ise is the lieutenant of the 1st Division. Intelligent and strict, she comes from a prestigious family with a unique Zanpakuto.

name: Shūhei Hisagi
description: Shūhei Hisagi is the lieutenant of the 9th Division. Serious and dutiful, he wields the dual scythe Zanpakuto Kazashini.

name: Rangiku Matsumoto
description: Rangiku Matsumoto is the lieutenant of the 10th Division. Cheerful, buxom, and easygoing, she is a skilled Shinigami with the ash Zanpakuto Haineko.

name: Yachiru Kusajishi
description: Yachiru Kusajishi was the lieutenant of the 11th Division. Kenpachi's adoptive daughter and a fierce fighter with unique sword abilities. She's originally Zaraki Kenpachi's Zanpakuto spirit.

name: Ikkaku Madarame
description: Ikkaku Madarame is the lieutenant of the 11th Division. A battle-loving bald warrior who hides his Bankai Ryumon Hozukimaru.

name: Nemu Kurotsuchi
description: Nemu Kurotsuchi is the former lieutenant of the 12th Division. An artificial being created by Mayuri, she is calm, obedient, and possesses immense regenerative abilities.

name: Akon
description: Akon is the lieutenant of the 12th Division. He works in the Shinigami Research Institute and has a calm, professional demeanor.

name: Kaien Shiba
description: Kaien Shiba was the former lieutenant of the 13th Division. Rukia's mentor and a charismatic leader who died fighting a Hollow.

name: Yumichika Ayasegawa
description: Yumichika Ayasegawa is the 5th seat of the 11th Division. Vain and beautiful, he hides the true power of his Zanpakuto Ruri'iro Kujaku.

name: Hanataro Yamada
description: Hanataro Yamada is the 7th seat of the 4th Division. Timid and kind-hearted, he is a healer who helped Ichigo during the Soul Society arc.

name: Ichibe Hyosube
description: Ichibe Hyosube is the captain of the 0 Division (Royal Guard). Known as the 'Monk Who Calls the Real Name,' he is the most ancient and powerful Shinigami with authority over names.

name: Tenjirō Kirinji
description: Tenjirō Kirinji, known as the 'Hot Spring Demon', is a member of Squad Zero. He created the healing hot springs in the Royal Palace and was formerly a captain-level healer who taught Unohana.

name: Kirio Hikifune
description: Kirio Hikifune, the 'Ruler of Grain', is a former captain of the 12th Division. She invented the Mod-Souls and creates special nutrient-rich food that dramatically boosts Shinigami power.

name: Ōetsu Nimaiya
description: Ōetsu Nimaiya is the 'God of the Sword' and creator of the Zanpakuto. He forges all Asauchi and is eccentric, speaking in a unique style. He is a member of Squad Zero.

name: Senjumaru Shutara
description: Senjumaru Shutara is the 'Great Weave Guard' of Squad Zero. She creates the uniforms and clothing for Soul Society and is a master weaver with powerful puppet and thread-based abilities.

name: Kurosaki Ichigo
description: Ichigo Kurosaki is the protagonist and a Substitute Shinigami. A hot-headed high schooler with immense potential, he protects both the living and the dead with his Zanpakuto Zangetsu.

name: Gotei 13
description: The Gotei 13 is the primary military branch of Soul Society, consisting of 13 Court Guard Squads led by captains. They protect the balance between the worlds from Hollows and threats

name: Coyote Stark
description: Coyote Stark is the Primera Espada. The strongest Espada, he is lazy and lonely, splitting his soul with Lilynette. His Resurrección Los Lobos allows him to fire countless Ceros.

name: Lilynette Gingerbuck
description: Lilynette is Stark's other half and part of the Primera Espada. She has a childish and energetic personality.

name: Barragan Luisenbarn
description: Barragan Luisenbarn is the Segunda Espada. The former King of Hueco Mundo, he controls aging and decay with his Resurrección Arrogante.

name: Tier Harribel
description: Tier Harribel is the Tercera Espada. The only female Espada, she values her comrades and controls water with her Resurrección Tiburón.

name: Ulquiorra Cifer
description: Ulquiorra Cifer is the Cuarta Espada. Cold and nihilistic, he represents emptiness and wields the bat-like Resurrección Murciélago

name: Nnoitra Gilga
description: Nnoitra Gilga is the Quinta Espada. A battle maniac who despises women, he has the strongest Hierro and wields six arms in his Resurrección Santa Teresa.

name: Grimmjow Jaegerjaquez
description: Grimmjow Jaegerjaquez is the Sexta Espada. A hot-blooded panther-like fighter and Ichigo's rival, he uses the Resurrección Pantera.

name: Zommari Rureaux
description: Zommari Rureaux is the Septima Espada. He possesses high-speed movement and the ability to control others with his eyes.

name: Szayelaporro Granz
description: Szayelaporro Granz is the Octava Espada. A mad scientist who experiments on others, he can reincarnate from his Fracción. He returned in the hell arc.

name: Aaroniero Arruruerie
description: Aaroniero Arruruerie is the Novena Espada. He consumes Hollows to gain their abilities and has two heads in his tank. He fought Kuchiki Rukia by using Kaien Shiba's form and abilities.

name: Yammy Lirastro
description: Yammy Llargo is the Cero (0) Espada. He grows stronger by getting angry and has massive size and power.

name: Nelliel Tu Odelschwanck
description: Nelliel is the former Tercera Espada. Kind-hearted in her adult form, she was betrayed by Nnoitra and turned into a child.

name: Dondochakka Birstanne
description: Dondochakka Birstanne is one of Nelliel’s Fracción. A large, comical arrancar who acts as comic relief along with Pesche.

name: Pesche Guatiche
description: Pesche Guatiche is one of Nelliel’s Fracción. He is loyal, timid, and often pairs with Dondochakka for comedic moments.

name: Cyan Sung-Sun
description: Cyan Sung-Sun is one of Harribel’s Fracción. Calm and intellectual, she has a snake-like Resurrección.

name: Emilou Apacci
description: Emilou Apacci is one of Harribel’s Fracción. Hot-tempered and deer-like in her Resurrección Cierva.

name: Franceska Mila Rose
description: Franceska Mila Rose is one of Harribel’s Fracción. Strong and lioness-like in her Resurrección Leona.

name: Loly Aivirrne
description: Loly Aivirrne is a fracción obsessed with Aizen. She is sadistic and wields a centipede-based Resurrección.

name: Menoly Mallia
description: Menoly Mallia is Loly’s partner and a fracción loyal to Aizen. She has a spider-like Resurrección.

name: Luppi Antenor
description: Luppi Antenor is the former Sexta Espada. Arrogant and tentacle-based in his Resurrección Trepadora.

name: Findorr Calius
description: Findorr Calius is a fracción of Barragan. He can adjust his power level by breaking his mask.

name: Choe Neng Poww
description: Choe Neng Poww is a giant fracción of Barragan with immense strength.He's even taller than Captain Sajin Komamura.

name: Nirgge Parduoc
description: Nirgge Parduoc is a mammoth-themed fracción of Barragan.

name: Abirama Redder
description: Abirama Redder is a hawk-themed fracción of Barragan known for his loud battle cries. His wings are like steel.

name: Ggio Vega
description: Ggio Vega is a tiger-themed fracción of Barragan, extremely fast and agile.

name: Yylfordt Granz
description: Yylfordt Granz is Szayelaporro’s older brother and a Privaron Espada. He has a bull-like Resurrección.

name: Nakeem Grindina
description: Nakeem Grindina is a large fracción of Grimmjow.

name: Shawlong Koufang
description: Shawlong Koufang is the leader of Grimmjow’s early fracción and a former Undecima Espada.

name: Di Roy Rinker
description: Di Roy Rinker is a fracción of Grimmjow with a bird-like appearance.

name: Cirucci Sanderwicci
description: Cirucci Sanderwicci is a Privaron Espada with a bird-like Resurrección Golondrina.

name: Tesra Lindocruz
description: Tesra Lindocruz is Nnoitra’s loyal fracción with a powerful Hierro.

name: Edrad Liones
description: Edrad Liones is a fracción of Grimmjow with volcanic powers.

name: Gantenbainne Mosqueda
description: Gantenbainne Mosqueda is a Privaron Espada with boxing-based abilities in his Resurrección Dragra.

name: Wonderweiss Margela
description: Wonderweiss Margela is a specially modified arrancar created by Aizen to counter Yamamoto’s flames.

name: Rudbornn Chelute
description: Rudbornn Chelute is the leader of the Exequias. He can create clones with his tree-based Resurrección.

name: Dordoni Alessandro Del Socaccio
description: Dordoni Alessandro Del Socaccio is a Privaron Espada with a flamboyant personality and wind-based powers.

name: Aguiarro Ebern
description: Aguiarro Ebern is a Quincy-arrancar hybrid who fought Ichigo. Later he was killed by Yhwach.

name: Luders Friegen
description: Luders Friegen is a Wandenreich arrancar subordinate.

name: Uryu Ishida
description: Uryu Ishida is a Quincy and Ichigo’s friend. He later becomes a key member of the Wandenreich as Sternritter A 'The Antithesis.'

name: Ryuken Ishida
description: Ryuken Ishida is Uryu’s father and a skilled Quincy surgeon. He is cold and pragmatic but deeply cares for his son.

name: Yhwach
description: Yhwach is the Quincy King and Father of the Quincy. He possesses 'The Almighty', the ability to see all possible futures and alter them at will. He led the Wandenreich in the invasion of Soul Society during the Thousand-Year Blood War.

name: Kurosaki Masaki
description: Masaki Kurosaki is Ichigo’s mother. A powerful Echt Quincy who was killed by Grand Fisher.

name: Jugram Haschwalth
japaneseName: ユーグラム・ハッシュヴァルト
description: Jugram Haschwalth is Yhwach’s right-hand man and Sternritter B The Balance. He is calm, strategic, and acts as the interim king.

name: Pernida Parnkgjas
japaneseName: ペルニダ・パルンカジャス
description: Pernida Parnkgjas is Sternritter C The Compulsory. It is the left hand of the Soul King with evolution and control abilities.

name: Askin Nakk Le Vaar
japaneseName: アシ　ン　ナック　ル　バ　ア
description: Askin Nakk Le Vaar is Sternritter D The Deathdealing. He is laid-back and can manipulate lethal doses of substances.

name: Bambietta Basterbine
japaneseName: バンビエッタ・バルスタイン
description: Bambietta Basterbine is Sternritter E The Explode. She is explosive in both personality and power.

name: As Nodt
japaneseName: ア　ス　ノ　ッ　ド
description: As Nodt is Sternritter F The Fear. He induces uncontrollable terror with his thorns. He Stole Byakuya's Bankai in the first Quincy invasion.

name: Liltotto Lieder
japaneseName: リルトット・ヴァルキリー
description: Liltotto Lieder is Sternritter G The Glutton. She can consume anything and has a sharp tongue.

name: Bazz-B
japaneseName: バズビー・ブロンドフィールド
description: Bazz-B is Sternritter H The Heat. He is hot-headed and controls flames.

name: Cang Du
description: Cang Du is Sternritter I The Iron. He possesses extremely strong defensive abilities.

name: Quilge Opie
description: Quilge Opie is Sternritter J The Jail. He is a ruthless executor who can trap opponents in Jail.

name: BG9
description: BG9 is Sternritter K. A robotic Quincy with powerful weaponry.

name: PePe Waccabrada
japaneseName: ペペ・ヴァッカバラーダ
description: PePe Waccabrada is Sternritter L The Love. He manipulates love and affection.

name: Gerard Valkyrie
japaneseName: ジェラルド・ヴァルキリー
description: Gerard Valkyrie is Sternritter M The Miracle. A giant warrior who grows stronger through miracles.

name: Robert Accutrone
japaneseName: ロバート・アキュトロン
description: Robert Accutrone is Sternritter N. He uses high-speed pistol combat.

name: Driscoll Berci
description: Driscoll Berci is Sternritter O The Overkill. He steals and amplifies power through killing.

name: Meninas McAllon
description: Meninas McAllon is Sternritter P The Power. She possesses immense physical strength.

name: Berenice Gabrielli
japaneseName: ベレニケ・ガブリエリ
description: Berenice Gabrielli is Sternritter Q The Question. She weakens opponents by questioning them.

name: Jerome Guizbatt
japaneseName: ジェローム・キルシュテッテン
description: Jerome Guizbatt is Sternritter R The Roar. He has a powerful sonic attack.

name: Mask De Masculine
japaneseName: マスク・ド・マスキュリン
description: Mask De Masculine is Sternritter S The Superstar. A wrestling-themed hero who gains power from cheers. James, a mini baby-like man cheers him from the ring side.

name: Candice Catnipp
japaneseName: キャンディス・キャットニップ
description: Candice Catnipp is Sternritter T The Thunderbolt. She controls lightning. She's member of the bambies.

name: NaNaNa Najahkoop
japaneseName: ナナナ・ナジャークープ
description: NaNaNa Najahkoop is Sternritter U The Underbelly. He analyzes and exploits weaknesses in his opponents reiatsu.

name: Gremmy Thoumeaux
japaneseName: グレミー・トゥミュー
description: Gremmy Thoumeaux is Sternritter V The Visionary. He can manifest anything he imagines. Guenael Lee is one of his imagination.

name: Guenael Lee
description: Guenael Lee is Sternritter V The Vanishing Point. He can make himself unseen.

name: Nianzol Weizol
japaneseName: ニャンゾル・ユイソル
description: Nianzol Weizol is Sternritter W The Wind. He bends space to deflect attacks.

name: Lille Barro
description: Lille Barro is Sternritter X The X-Axis. He can shoot through anything and becomes intangible.

name: Loyd-Lloyd
description: Loyd Lloyd is Sternritter Y The Yourself. He can copy the appearance and abilities of others. There's two Loyd Lloyd, one killed by Zaraki Kenpachi and other by Yamamoto Genryusai.

name: Giselle Gewelle
japaneseName: ジゼル・ヴェヴェーレ
description: Giselle Gewelle is Sternritter Z The Zombie. She can turn the dead into zombies.

name: Shazz Domino
description: Shazz Domino is a Sternritter who uses knife-based attacks. His shrift is Unknown.

name: Keigo Asano
description: Keigo Asano is Ichigo’s eccentric and energetic best friend. He provides comic relief.

name: Mizuho Asano
description: Mizuho Asano is Keigo’s older sister. She is strict and has a strong personality.

name: Mizuiro Kojima
description: Mizuiro Kojima is one of Ichigo’s friends. He is calm, popular with girls, and surprisingly observant.

name: Tatsuki Arisawa
description: Tatsuki Arisawa is Orihime’s best friend and a skilled martial artist. She is tomboyish and protective.

name: Chizuru Honshō
description: Chizuru Honshō is a classmate of Ichigo and Orihime. She is openly lesbian and comically perverted toward Orihime.

name: Jinta Hanakari
description: Jinta Hanakari is a young employee at the Urahara Shop. He is energetic, rude, and often fights with Ururu.

name: Orihime Inoue
description: Orihime Inoue is Ichigo’s classmate and close friend. She has the powerful rejection ability Shun Shun Rikka and a kind, optimistic personality.

name: Yasutora Sado
ability: Fullbring (Brazo Derecha de Gigante / Brazo Izquierdo del Diablo)
description: Yasutora Sado, known as Chad, is one of Ichigo Kurosaki's best friends. A quiet, gentle giant of Mexican-Japanese descent, he possesses immense physical strength and later awakens Fullbring powers. Loyal and protective, he fights with his fists and never starts conflicts.

name: Ururu Tsumugiya
description: Ururu Tsumugiya is a young-looking employee at the Urahara Shop. Despite her meek and polite demeanor, she possesses incredible combat ability (anti-Shinigami level) and uses a multi-barreled shoulder cannon. She assists in training and shop duties alongside Jinta.

name: Don Kanonji
description: Don Kanonji is a famous TV ghost hunter known for his Soul Buster catchphrase. He inspired Ichigo in his youth.
